entities.name: Gratitude
entities.context: Core practice/framework for reflection across three dimensions

entities.name: Relationships
entities.context: First dimension of gratitude practice - appreciation for people, support, connection

entities.name: Experiences
entities.context: Second dimension of gratitude practice - appreciation for moments, events, memories

entities.name: Circumstances
entities.context: Third dimension of gratitude practice - appreciation for conditions, resources, privileges

entities.name: Gratitude Reflection Framework
entities.context: Structured journaling technique with three categories and deepening prompts

relationships.context: Relationships is one of three core dimensions in the framework
Experiences is one of three core dimensions in the framework
Circumstances is one of three core dimensions in the framework
Gratitude is the core concept the framework is built around
